children.text: develop, implement, and expand comprehensive and clinically-appropriate family-based substance abuse treatment programs as alternatives to incarceration for nonviolent parent drug offenders; and
to provide prison-based family treatment programs for incarcerated parents of minor children or pregnant women.1So in original. The word “to” probably should not appear.1
